mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, model_id, capability_code, config_json, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time FROM ai_model_capability WHERE status = '0' AND del_flag = '0' AND model_id IN #{id} ORDER BY model_id, capability_code
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_model_capability SET del_flag = '1', update_time = NOW() WHERE model_id = #{modelId} AND del_flag = '0'
